title: jacobaea × mirabilis
intro: Jacobaea × mirabilis, also known as the Mirabilis hawk's beard or Marsh Hawk's-beard, is a rare and hybrid plant species within the daisy family. It is said to have medicinal properties, particularly in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Jacobaea × mirabilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties.
